So, you know, we can go a couple of routes here.
sounds like since you want to involve Maddie, maybe it's best we follow up and just like we can have one of our EAs, find a time for everyone.
I can also just pull up a time now, you know, your call.
So, yeah, let's do...
Honestly, next week is not great.
We do stuff in the week of the, like, either, like, Tuesday, like, 13th or 14th of May.
But I'll be back in San Francisco, so I could probably just sign in.
Do in person that Maddie could do.
She's in Seattle, so she could do that.
Cool.
Yeah, if we have the opportunity to do the 13th, that would be great because Marcel is going to be on.
He's going to be in Hawaii next week.
I might have to dial in on the 13 just because I'm actually planning my own trip for the next day.
But that is like actually the one day in the next couple of weeks you nailed it on the bullseye.
That actually seems to be decent for us.
Let's just lock it in.
I'm pretty flexible right now.
Okay, I'll send the time.
Let me know if for whatever reason that doesn't work.
Additionally, what we like to do at this phase is spin up a Slack channel just to be able to, like, instead of email, just have the back and forth.
So we'll invite you to that, and then we can share those examples Marcel had and any other questions that come up along the way.
We can just have the back and forth there.
Yeah, for sure.
My email, in case you don't have it, it's ck at Metronome.
Yep, I saw that.
I saw that.
Yep.
Sounds good.
We'll find the time, and yeah, I'm really looking forward to chatting more, Chris.
Yeah, likewise.
Thanks, man.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX and Metronome for scaling marketing efforts and content production.](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Metronome is shifting focus to target finance leaders (CFOs) and product leaders (CPOs) as key decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [GrowthX demonstrated their AI-powered content creation process, emphasizing speed, quality, and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Chris Kent (Metronome) expressed interest but raised concerns about AI-generated content sounding genuine and aligning with Metronome's new messaging](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

## Topics

### Metronome's Marketing Priorities

  - [Chris Kent, new marketing lead at Metronome (3 weeks in), aims to scale marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Focus on extracting more value from existing high-value content (e.g., CEO webinars, podcasts)](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Shift towards bite-sized, consumable content for social media and digital platforms](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Developing a "cloud operating model for monetization" as a foundational piece](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)

### Target Audience Shift

  - [Moving downstream to target finance leaders (CFOs) and product leaders (CPOs)](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [For AI companies, still focused on founders and CTOs due to company structure](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Recognizing increased influence of finance in purchasing decisions since 2022](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [AI-powered workflow that scrapes websites, generates briefs, and creates detailed content](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Demonstrated creation of company overview, personas, and jobs-to-be-done in minutes](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Emphasis on developing a comprehensive content strategy and editorial direction](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Proposal to create a publication named "Throughput" for Metronome, targeting revenue operations professionals](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)

### Implementation and Quality Concerns

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end service, including CMS integration, content publishing, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Chris raised concerns about AI-generated content sounding genuine and intentional](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [GrowthX addressed this through calibration, editorial guidelines, and human oversight in the process](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

### Content Improvement Example

  - [GrowthX demonstrated quick improvement of Metronome's top-performing article](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=1870.0)
  - [Highlighted the need for more impactful, concise messaging in existing content](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting on May 13th with Chris Kent and Maddie from Metronome](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up Slack channel for ongoing communication and sharing examples](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=2061.0)
  - [Chris to review sample content improvements sent by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
  - [Potential in-person meeting in San Francisco to be explored](https://fathom.video/share/NPfisTfZiMymrJdyHi6M_sDjqcBUWWPU?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)

action_items.description: Send polished content samples to Chris (ck@metronome)
Schedule follow-up meeting for May 13th w/ Chris, Maddie, Marcel. Send calendar invite.
Set up Slack channel for Metronome team. Invite Chris (ck@metronome).
Share content examples from Marcel in new Slack channel
